With strong infrastructure growth and improving connectivity, Bachupally is an ideal location for families and investors seeking long term value and comfortable urban living.

resultList.dtldesc: Experience comfortable living with this spacious 3 BHK villa for sale in Tukkuguda, Hyderabad. Nestled in a rapidly developing area, this property offers a perfect blend of modern amenities and serene surroundings.Property SpecificationsThis under-construction 3 BHK home in Maheshwaram, is set for possession in 3 to 4 months. Spanning a generous 2560 sqft, this G 2 property is designed for comfortable living with well-planned interiors and modern specifications. The ground floor features a spacious living room, a well-laid-out normal kitchen, a puja room, one bedroom with an attached western-style bathroom, and a hall. The first floor offers two bedrooms, both with attached western-style bathrooms and geysers, along with two balconies for ample ventilation. The second floor includes a small room and an additional washroom, adding to the convenience. The kitchen comes with an attached utility space, and the flooring is done with premium granite and vitrified tiles. This west-facing, Vastu-compliant home ensures a harmonious and peaceful living experience.Facilities The property comes with excellent facilities to ensure a comfortable and secure living experience. It includes covered parking for residents convenience and 24-hour water supply for uninterrupted usage. A 100 power backup facility is in place to tackle any electricity outages. Security is well-maintained with a dedicated security guard and CCTV surveillance, providing a safe and secure environment for residents.Locality Strategically located in Maheshwaram, Hyderabad, this property offers seamless connectivity and proximity to key destinations. It is just a 2-minute drive from Outer Ring Road Exit 14 and a 5-minute drive from Fab City SEZ, Micromax, Be Limited, and TSIIC SEZ. The location ensures easy access to major commercial and entertainment hubs, with Adibatla TCS, Wonderla Amusement Park, and Aerospace Park just 10 minutes away.Education and healthcare facilities are within reach, with Sri Sri Academy, The Aga Khan International School, and Manchester International School all within a short drive. Shamshabad International Airport is only 15 minutes away, while Mucharla IT Park and Pharma City can be reached in 20 minutes. Major business districts, including Financial District, Gachibowli, and Hitech City, are within 30-40 minutes of travel time. Additionally, the area benefits from upcoming infrastructure projects, making it a prime investment for the future.
